title: tragacantha ruscifolia
intro: Tragacantha ruscifolia, also known as Needle Grass or Needle Weed, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation, which is thought to be due to its saponin content. The health benefits of Tragacantha ruscifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote digestion and relieve urinary tract issues.
